---
title: "environmental_indicators"
format: html
editor: source
---

```{r, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
```

```{r}
tbl_heat <- list.files("../raw/", full.names = TRUE) %>%
  map(function(path) {
    city <- basename(path) %>%
      stringr::str_remove("^heatwave_") %>%
      stringr::str_remove("_2025_with_t2m_utci\\.csv$")
    
    txt <- readr::read_file(path) %>%
      stringr::str_replace_all("\r\r\n", "\n") %>%
      stringr::str_replace_all("\r\n", "\n") %>%
      stringr::str_replace_all("\r", "\n")
    
    read_csv(
      I(txt),
      col_types = cols(
        date = col_character(),
        utci_daily_mean = col_double(),
        t2m_daily_mean = col_double(),
        posEHF = col_character(),
        Euroheat = col_character()
      ),
      skip_empty_rows = TRUE
    ) %>%
      filter(!is.na(date), date != "") %>%
      mutate(
        city = stringr::str_to_title(city),
        date = lubridate::as_date(date),
        posEHF = posEHF == "True",
        Euroheat = Euroheat == "True",
        .before = 1
      )
  }) %>%
  bind_rows() 
```

```{r}
any(tbl_heat$posEHF & tbl_heat$Euroheat)
```


```{r}
tbl_heat <- tbl_heat %>%
  mutate(heatwave_type = case_when(posEHF & Euroheat ~ "both",
                                   posEHF & !Euroheat ~ "ehf_only",
                                   !posEHF & Euroheat ~ "euroheat_only",
                                   TRUE ~ "no_event"),
         heatwave_type = factor(heatwave_type,
                                levels = c("both", "ehf_only",
                                           "euroheat_only", "no_event")))
```

```{r}
write_csv(tbl_heat, "../processed/thermal_daily_2025.csv")
```
